title: Continue Pod work and expand unit tests
body:
This cherry-picks three commits off the BoltDB state PR #184 that can be merged independently.

It continues work on preparing to add pods by adding new methods to state, and expands unit testing of states to include the in-memory state implementation.

comments.body: This should be ready for review now. It should include everything in #184 not directly related to the BoltDB state
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 4d70a69) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
No I agree with @TomSweeneyRedHat Those errors should be changed, before merged.  Callers could be checking if the POD did not exist, and not reporting the error.

I can rename ErrCtrRemoved/ErrPodRemoved to ErrCtrInvalid/ErrPodInvalid, but the most common cause of invalid pods/containers is them being removed from the database (the other is uninitialized data).

Ok I will let it go then.

@rh-atomic-bot r+

:pushpin: Commit 535656d has been approved by `rhatdan`
